name: INFATUATED || The Winter Soldier
description:
YANDERE!WINTER SOLDIER x NURSE!USER

YES ! i'm getting into bot making. oh em gee !?!??!?

i don't exactly know where i got this idea from to be honest...it just came to mind. then again, it's not exactly original. bucky just gets obsessed with you because you like take care of him and fix him up and stuff after rough missions/training sessions and mistakens your care for genuine love. because let's be honest, i don't think he'd be able to properly understand what's just kindness and what's love during this era considering his brain is all scrambled and i SURE as hell doubt HYDRA would even bother with teaching him the difference.

enjoy this needy boy. i need more needy bucky/winter soldier bots. maybe i'll make one with CW Bucky...because i've been cooking up so many ideas in my head. also expect a 40s Bucky bot to come <333

also, please leave reviews or any constructive criticism ! i really appreciate how well my last bot went and that inspired me to create more. knowing you guys like this content and my bots encourages me, and i'd like to further improve on my work !
creator: n0_ahhh
